zh.lifeSummary: 當Roald III de DONGES於大約1175年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可東格斯時，他的父親Vicomte Eudon Eon De Donges27歲，母親Mathilde27歲。他和Tiphaine de RETZ至少有1個女兒。他去世於大約1219年享年46歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: DONGES
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German (also Dönges): variant of Tonjes . Compare Doenges .

variants.name: Tonjes
meanings: North German, East Frisian, and North Frisian (Tönjes): patronymic from a shortened pet form of the personal name Antonius (see Anthony ). The surname Tönjes is very rare in North Frisia. Compare Toenjes .

nameMeanings.name: Roald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Roald III de DONGES was born about 1175, in Donges, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Vicomte Eudon Eon De Donges, was 27 and his mother, Mathilde, was 27. He had at least 1 daughter with Tiphaine de RETZ. He died about 1219, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roald III de DONGES est né environ 1175, à Donges, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Vicomte Eudon Eon De Donges, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mathilde, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Tiphaine de RETZ. Il est décédé environ 1219, à l’âge de 46 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roald III de DONGES è nato il circa 1175 nel Donges, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Francia, il suo padre, Vicomte Eudon Eon De Donges, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Tiphaine de RETZ. Morì circa 1219, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roald III de DONGESが約1175年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーロイアーエ-アトランティクドンジェズで生まれた時，父Vicomte Eudon Eon De Dongesは27歳，母Mathildeは27歳であった。彼はTiphaine de RETZとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1219年に46歳で死去した。

ko.Donges, Saint-Nazaire, Loire-Atlantique,: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 세인트-나제이르
ko.Donges,44052,Loire-Atlantique,Pays de la: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 도그스
ko.lifeSummary: Roald III de DONGES(이)가 대략 1175년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 도그스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Vicomte Eudon Eon De Donges(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Tiphaine de RETZ(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1219년 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roald III de DONGES родился около 1175 г. в местности донгесь, лоире-атлантику, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Vicomte Eudon Eon De Donges было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde, 27. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Tiphaine de RETZ. Он умер около 1219 г. в возрасте 46 лет.
